name: codex-linux-build
description: Build and release tooling for the Linux adaptation of OpenAI Codex Desktop

scripts.verify: bash -n build.sh && bash -n start.sh && bash -n ../scripts/ci-lib.sh && bash -n ../scripts/enable-pnpm.sh && bash -n ../scripts/install-actionlint.sh && bash -n ../scripts/validate-workflows.sh && bash -n ../scripts/verify-portable-artifact.sh && bash -n ../scripts/verify-arch-package.sh && bash -n ../scripts/verify-deb-package.sh && bash -n ../scripts/verify-release-assets.sh && bash -n ../scripts/generate-release-notes.sh && bash -n ../scripts/build-arch-package.sh && bash -n ../scripts/build-deb-package.sh && bash -n ../packaging/arch/codex-desktop-wrapper.sh && bash -n ../packaging/skills-overrides/.curated/playwright/scripts/playwright_cli.sh && ./build.sh --help >/dev/null && ../scripts/generate-release-notes.sh --help >/dev/null && ../scripts/build-arch-package.sh --help >/dev/null && ../scripts/build-deb-package.sh --help >/dev/null && ../scripts/verify-portable-artifact.sh --help >/dev/null && ../scripts/verify-arch-package.sh --help >/dev/null && ../scripts/verify-deb-package.sh --help >/dev/null && ../scripts/verify-release-assets.sh --help >/dev/null

author: mazix
